name: Swiss Arabian Ladies Wild Spirit EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 6295124030086
description.complete:
Unleash your inner confidence with Swiss Arabian Wild Spirit, a captivating Eau de Parfum Spray crafted exclusively for ladies who embrace life with bold elegance. This 3.4 oz fragrance weaves together a vibrant blend of nature-inspired notes, creating a scent that’s as unforgettable as the woman who wears it.

At the first spritz, Wild Spirit opens with refreshing top notes of green leaves, zesty orange, and sparkling bergamot. These crisp and lively scents awaken the senses, setting the stage for a heart full of feminine charm. The fragrance blooms into a rich bouquet of tuberose and jasmine, delicately balanced with sweet fruity notes that add a playful twist to its floral core.

As the scent settles, it reveals a warm and sensual base of creamy sandalwood, soft musk, and smooth vanilla, enhanced by the powdery elegance of orris root. This luxurious finish creates a long-lasting impression that gently lingers, making Wild Spirit your perfect day-to-night signature scent.

Designed by the renowned fragrance house Swiss Arabian, Wild Spirit is more than just a perfume—it's a personal statement of strength, grace, and individuality. Whether you're heading to a special event or simply embracing everyday moments, this exquisite EDP spray wraps you in a scent that’s both empowering and enchanting.

Swiss Arabian Ladies Wild Spirit EDP Spray 3.4 oz is a must-have addition to any fragrance collection. Discover the magnetic charm of Wild Spirit—where elegance meets adventure.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.
